concerns.text: FeatureSet entity lists 'sentiment_score' as a column, but no FR requires computing sentiment scores. This creates an inconsistency between the entity definition and requirements. Either add an FR for sentiment computation or remove from FeatureSet.

SC-003 specifies WAIC improvement ≥5% relative to baseline. The idea did not specify this threshold. This is a specific empirical value that should be deferred to implementation phase per spec template guidance.

Coverage target of 0.85-0.90 is specified in acceptance scenarios and SC-002. The idea did not specify this threshold. This should use [deferred] marker per spec template guidance for planning artifacts.
